params.Name: Personal Incarnation Redirection
params.SpellDescription: The next 1 damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME this turn is dealt to its owner instead. Only CARDNAME's owner may activate this ability.

remaining_params.Name: Personal Incarnation Redirection
remaining_params.SpellDescription: The next 1 damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME this turn is dealt to its owner instead. Only CARDNAME's owner may activate this ability.

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME dies, its owner loses half their life, rounded up.
